posts.author: Louisehkansson (Louise)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like the ability to create a dashboard as a managed template.

What are you trying to achieve

I have the same dashboard set up for all our different regions but with different filters. I would like to be able to make bulk-updates to the dashboards without having to go to ten different dashboards and copy-pasting information = managed template.
